name: Tundra
description: A frozen wasteland whose stillness yields steady tribute. Tribute: always produces 1 Essence.

name: Forest
description: Where one tree grows, others follow. Tribute: produces 1 Essence for each Forest you control (including itself).

name: Jungle
description: Lush, untamed, and only useful to those who walk it. Tribute: produces 0 Essence if you have no units; 2 if you control at least one.

name: Mountain
description: Peaks crackle with arcane echoes. Tribute: produces 2 Essence on any turn you cast a spell.

name: Ocean
description: Tides drink in your rival's magic. Tribute: produces 2 Essence on any turn your opponent casts a spell.

name: Desert
description: Bursts of bounty between long droughts. Tribute: produces 2 Essence, then skips its next Tribute.

name: Beach
description: Where worlds begin. Tribute: produces 1 Essence as long as you control an ocean; otherwise, produces 2 Essence if it is the only land in your Domain.

name: River
description: A current that feeds the lands it touches. Tribute: produces 1 Essence for each adjacent Forest, Ocean, or Beach in your Domain.

name: The Worldspring
description: The first water, from which all rivers flow. Tribute: always produces 3 Essence. You may control only one Worldspring.

name: Sprout Acolyte
description: A novice spirit, eager and fragile.

name: Stoneborn Sentinel
description: Hewn from the bones of the mountain. Patient, watchful, hard to break.

name: Tide Marauder
description: A raider of the salt-paths, swift and merciless.

name: Tempest Drake
description: A storm given wings and a will.

name: Glacial Behemoth
description: Centuries asleep beneath the ice. Slow to wake. Slower to fall.

name: Avatar of Genesis
description: The first thought of the first god, made flesh. When it walks, the world remembers.

name: Cataclysm
description: The end of an age. Raze every land in your opponent's Domain.
